$schema-comment: Per-tool install recipes. Each tool may declare: apt (Debian/Ubuntu), brew (macOS), dnf (Fedora), pacman (Arch), winget (Windows), pip (Python pkg), npm (Node pkg), pipx (isolated Python tool), script (one-line bash installer), manual (URL — needs human intervention), needs (free-text caveat). The cli installer tries package managers first in OS-appropriate order, then falls back to pip/npm if declared, then prints the manual hint.

acpx.needs: Headless ACP client — delegate to other coding agents (codex, claude, pi, etc.) instead of PTY scraping. Session state lives in ~/.acpx/

wireshark.needs: after install: sudo usermod -aG wireshark $USER; relogin

wifite.needs: Kali/security distro; on Ubuntu use pip3 install --user wifite2

zeek.manual: Not in default apt — needs OpenSUSE Build Service repo. See https://docs.zeek.org/en/master/install.html

jadx.manual: Not in Ubuntu apt. Download from https://github.com/skylot/jadx/releases or use snap (3rd-party): sudo snap install jadx-android-decompiler

kubectl.needs: Default Ubuntu apt has no kubectl — using snap. For apt: see https://kubernetes.io/docs/tasks/tools/install-kubectl-linux/

helm.needs: Default Ubuntu apt has no helm — using snap

terraform.needs: Default Ubuntu apt has no terraform — using snap. For apt: https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/install

kibana.manual: Part of Elastic Stack — install elasticsearch first

cuckoo.manual: Sandbox — needs full setup; pip3 install -U cuckoo or use Cuckoo3 fork

rustup.needs: After install: source $HOME/.cargo/env or open a new shell so PATH picks up ~/.cargo/bin

cargo.needs: Ships with rustup — installing rustup also installs cargo, rustc, clippy, rustfmt

clippy.needs: Invoked as `cargo clippy`. Requires rustup to be installed first

rustfmt.needs: Invoked as `cargo fmt` or `rustfmt`. Requires rustup

cargo-watch.needs: Requires cargo. Run `cargo watch -x check -x test` for tight feedback

cargo-nextest.needs: Drop-in faster test runner — `cargo nextest run`

cargo-edit.needs: Provides `cargo add/rm/upgrade/set-version`. Mostly built into cargo since 1.62 but cargo-edit adds rm/upgrade

cargo-expand.needs: Shows macro expansions. Run `cargo expand` in a crate

cargo-outdated.needs: Run `cargo outdated` to see deps with newer versions available

cargo-udeps.needs: Like cargo-machete but more thorough. Requires nightly: `cargo +nightly udeps`

cargo-audit.needs: Scans Cargo.lock against RustSec advisory DB. Run `cargo audit`

cargo-deny.needs: Policy enforcement: licenses, advisories, duplicate versions, banned crates. Run `cargo deny init` then `cargo deny check`

cargo-geiger.needs: Counts use of `unsafe` in dependencies. Run `cargo geiger`

cargo-vet.needs: Supply-chain auditing tool by Mozilla. Run `cargo vet init`

cargo-crev.needs: Crowd-sourced code review trust web. Run `cargo crev`

cargo-flamegraph.needs: Requires perf (linux: linux-tools-common) or dtrace (macos). Run `cargo flamegraph`

cargo-criterion.needs: Frontend for criterion benches. Run `cargo criterion`

cargo-bloat.needs: Analyses what takes space in the binary. Run `cargo bloat --release`

bacon.needs: Background `cargo check` TUI. Run `bacon` in a crate

sccache.needs: Compiler cache. Set RUSTC_WRAPPER=sccache in your shell or .cargo/config.toml

wasm-pack.needs: Build Rust crates as WASM modules with JS bindings

trunk.needs: Build/serve WASM web apps (Yew, Leptos, Sycamore). Also needs `rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown`

dioxus.needs: Dioxus app dev CLI. Run `dx new <name>`, `dx serve`

tauri.needs: Desktop apps. Run `cargo tauri init` or `npm create tauri-app`

sqlx.needs: DB migrations + offline query caching. Run `sqlx migrate add <name>` / `sqlx migrate run`

sea-orm-cli.needs: Entity generation + migrations for SeaORM. Run `sea-orm-cli generate entity`

diesel.needs: Diesel ORM CLI. Replace features with sqlite/mysql as needed. apt line installs the libpq build dep

mdbook.needs: Static docs site from markdown. Run `mdbook init <dir>` then `mdbook serve`

cross.needs: Cross-compile via Docker images. Run `cross build --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu`. Requires docker

just.needs: Task runner — Justfile syntax, like make but sane

tokio-console.needs: Live runtime introspection for tokio. App must enable console-subscriber + RUSTFLAGS="--cfg tokio_unstable"

cargo-insta.needs: Snapshot testing review tool. Run `cargo insta test` then `cargo insta review`

cargo-fuzz.needs: libFuzzer integration. Requires nightly: `cargo +nightly fuzz run <target>`

cargo-hack.needs: Test all feature combos: `cargo hack check --feature-powerset`

cargo-mutants.needs: Mutation testing — verifies tests actually catch bugs. Run `cargo mutants`

release-plz.needs: Automated versioning + changelog + crates.io publish. Best wired into GitHub Actions

cargo-chef.needs: Used inside Dockerfiles to cache dep compilation as a layer. Multi-stage: `cargo chef prepare` → `cargo chef cook`

cargo-msrv.needs: Find/verify minimum supported Rust version. Run `cargo msrv find` or `cargo msrv verify`

cargo-readme.needs: Generate README.md from lib.rs doc comments. Run `cargo readme > README.md`

maturin.needs: Build + publish PyO3 / cffi Python extension modules written in Rust. Run `maturin develop` for local install or `maturin build --release`

napi.needs: Build native Node.js addons from Rust via NAPI-RS. Run `napi new` then `napi build`

uniffi-bindgen.needs: Generate Kotlin/Swift/Python/Ruby bindings from a single Rust UDL spec. Used by Mozilla, Bitwarden

bindgen.needs: Generate Rust FFI from C headers: `bindgen wrapper.h -o bindings.rs`. Needs libclang at runtime — `apt install libclang-dev` or `brew install llvm` (set LIBCLANG_PATH on macOS)

cbindgen.needs: Generate C/C++ headers from a Rust crate: `cbindgen --config cbindgen.toml -o include/mylib.h`

probe-rs.needs: Embedded debugger/flasher (replaces OpenOCD for most targets). Ships `probe-rs`, `cargo-embed`, `cargo-flash`

cargo-embed.needs: Ships with probe-rs. Flash + RTT console: `cargo embed --release`

cargo-binutils.script: cargo install cargo-binutils --locked && rustup component add llvm-tools-preview
cargo-binutils.needs: size/objdump/strip on Rust binaries via LLVM tools. Run `cargo size --release`

chisel.needs: Rust-powered precision file tools for AI agents (patch-based edits, path confinement). Primarily an MCP server; the `chisel` binary speaks MCP over stdio/HTTP

chromium.needs: Headless browser for PNG / PDF rendering. Any Chromium-family binary works (chromium, google-chrome, microsoft-edge); recipes default to upstream Chromium

uv.needs: Astral's ultra-fast Python package manager. Used by MiroFish and many modern Python projects in place of pip+venv. After install: source $HOME/.cargo/env or open a new shell

scc.needs: Sloc Cloc and Code — fast code line counter. Used by gstack throughput metrics and retro skills

playwright.needs: Browser automation. After install run: npx playwright install chromium (downloads ~150MB headless Chromium to ~/.cache/ms-playwright/)
